title: Adopt SpecSync 5.0.1 and Trust 1.0.0 governance for CS
description: Adopt SpecSync 5.0.1 and Trust 1.0.0 governance for CS
no_spec_change_rationale: This migration adds governance configuration and CI orchestration without changing application behavior; future meaningful application changes must add or update canonical specifications.
acceptance_criteria: SpecSync advisory coverage passes; all four agent integrations are installed; Trust doctor passes; TypeScript checking, 38 exercise validation tests, and the production Angular build pass; existing multi-language CI remains green.
